name: metro-railgun-node-host
description: Embedded Node host that runs the RAILGUN engine + Groth16 native prover inside nodejs-mobile-react-native. Scaffold only — engine deps added in the integration commit (see main.js NEXT STEPS).

dependencies._comment: TODO(integration): add the engine deps below, then rebuild the APK. They are NOT installed yet so this scaffold stays inert + commits without a network fetch. Versions mirror RAILGUN Railway-Wallet's nodejs-project. The native-prover is the N-API addon Hermes cannot load — the entire reason for this host.
